---
title: ''
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Variable setup

```{r}
#Nation p
a=0.6 #mutual fear
b=0.5 #expenditure
r=-5 #goodwill/grievance


#Nation g
c=0.6 #mutual fear
d=0.5 #expenditure
s=-5 #goodwill/grievance

#Simulation variables
t=20
dt=0.01
steps=t/dt


```

# Starting Conditions and simulation

```{r}
#Matrix and initial
ArmsRace = matrix(0,nrow=3,ncol=steps+1) #3 rows are for t,p,g, n+1 columns for including both endpoints of time (start at 0)
ArmsRace[1,1]=0

ArmsRace[2,1]=4 #p initial condition
ArmsRace[3,1]=3 #g initial condition


#Euler Method
for (i in 1:steps) {
  t_i=ArmsRace[1,i]
  p_i=ArmsRace[2,i]
  g_i=ArmsRace[3,i]
  
  dp=a*g_i-b*p_i+r
  dg=c*p_i-d*g_i+s
  
  ArmsRace[1,i+1]=t_i+dt
  ArmsRace[2,i+1]=max(p_i+dt*dp,0)
  ArmsRace[3,i+1]=max(g_i+dt*dg,0)
}

```

# Plot Results

```{r}
plot(ArmsRace[1,],ArmsRace[2,],type = "l",col="blue",xlab="Time",ylab="National Arms",lwd=2)
lines(ArmsRace[1,],ArmsRace[3,],col="red",lwd=2)
legend("topright",legend=c("Nation P","Nation G"),col=c("blue","red"),lwd=2)
```
